title: spigelia nicotianiflora
intro: Spigelia nicotianiflora, also known as Indian pink or redroot, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Spigelia nicotianiflora include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as its use in treating fever and rheumatic conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas or tinctures, and can also be used in homeopathic remedies.
